properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v1 v2 v3 v3 v2 v3 v4 v3 v1 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We’re gonna worship the King We’re gonna praise His name We’re gonna lift up holy hands We’re gonna worship the King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We’re gonna praise Him in the morning Praise Him in the night Praise Him all day long We’re gonna lift up the mighty name of Jesus You'll hear me singing this song

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We’re gonna worship the King (Worship the King) We’re gonna praise His name We’re gonna lift up holy hands We’re gonna worship the King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We’re gonna worship the King (Worship) We’re gonna praise His name We’re gonna lift up holy hands We’re gonna worship the King

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We're gonna lift up holy hands We're gonna worship the King We're gonna lift up holy hands We're gonna worship the King
